codeReview.summary: The commit correctly implements the two concrete polish fixes it targets: wizard reset on re-entry to `/generate` and safe streaming teardown on navigation away. `GeneratePage` now clears wizard state on mount/re-entry and on popstate exit cases, and `RecipeStream` now aborts active streams on unmount and guards async save paths with mount checks to avoid post-unmount saves/state updates. Pantry-backed idea generation was already present in `src/app/api/generate/ideas/route.ts` and remains intact.

sharedStateObservations.observation: fullstack-worker requires agent-browser verification, but this run skipped agent-browser and still reported procedure adherence; this suggests the skill procedure is too rigid for some state-management-only fixes or enforcement is inconsistent.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: SKILL.md mandates Step 7 manual verification with `agent-browser`; transcript skeleton for workerSessionId 85bff3d6-4198-437f-b6fb-57ed353f648a contains no `agent-browser` invocation and no `interactiveChecks`, while handoff `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` is true.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature contract sequencing remains inconsistent: this generation cross-flow feature expects `/recipes` visibility behaviors while recipe list/detail implementation is still planned in conversion milestone.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json: generation-cross-flows expectedBehavior includes 'Generated recipe visible in /recipes list' and 'Multiple recipes all appear in list' (lines ~681-685), while `recipes-list-and-detail` is milestone `conversion` and status `pending` (lines ~111-159); repo `src/app` currently has no `/recipes` route.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, and commit 89183b6572150a479725904459c40a6066a73934. No high-confidence code defects were found in this feature commit; status is pass, with shared-state observations recorded for skill-process and feature-sequencing gaps.
